name: Automatos Social Templates
description: Repeatable post templates for Automatos playbooks. Render via render/index.html?template=<name>&size=<size>&<field>=<value>.

showChip.desc: Show "N/M" page chip next to handle

eyebrow.desc: Caps mono label in black pill at top

fontSize.desc: Override headline font-size in px (defaults vary per size)

headline.desc: Pipe-separated lines. Suffix with @brick to color in orange.

definition.label: Definition / Explainer
definition.use: What is X? carousel slide w/ 3 body cards

card_1.example: Not just a chatbot|A chatbot replies. An agent acts.

quote.desc: The quote text — no surrounding quotes (template adds them)
quote.example: If you're not the model, you're the harness.

accent.desc: Substring of quote to color brick orange

formats.lines: Pipe-separated headline lines. Append @brick to a line to render in brand orange (#FF6932). Example: 'WHAT IS|AN AGENT?@brick'
formats.card: Pipe-separated 'Heading|Body' string. Heading rendered bold, body muted. Example: 'Not just a chatbot|A chatbot replies. An agent acts.'
formats.stat: Pipe-separated 'Value|Body' string. Value is huge orange number, body is small mono caption. Example: '5×|Manus rewrote their harness.'

renderProtocol.ready: When the page is fully rendered (fonts loaded, layout settled), `document.body[data-render-ready]` becomes `"true"` AND `window.__renderReady === true`. Headless renderers should wait on either.
renderProtocol.viewport: Set the headless browser viewport to the size's exact pixel dimensions BEFORE navigating. The page sizes itself to match the `?size=` param.
renderProtocol.format: Capture as PNG. JPEG is acceptable but loses the cream-paper subtle gradient.
renderProtocol.timeout: 5s is plenty. Templates have no animation; they're static at first paint after fonts load.
